EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when a customer's DD payment has failed at the first attempt.
EmailTemplate.name: Payment Failed, 1st Attempt Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Your most recent payment failed
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You currently pay for your Kingsbridge business insurance policy [policy number] through direct debit payments.
Our credit providers Close Brothers Premium Finance have informed us that your most recent direct debit payment failed on [date].
You do not need to do anything, as Close Brothers will re-attempt this payment on [date].
If this second payment fails, our team will contact you directly to resolve.
If you have made a payment in the past 3 working days please disregard this email.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
